note_text: Wound note - Abdominalwal. Meas 4.3x3.2x1.2cm. Heavy serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 34% gran, 66% slough. Periwound intact. Foam dsg changed. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Kaczmarek notified.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Abdominal wall wound site, rates 7/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Surgical surgical Abdominal wall measures 4.3 cm x 3.2 cm x 1.2 cm.
  Wound bed: 43% slough, 57% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Surgical surgical Abdominal wall — not improving.
Plan: Alginate dressing applied. Offloading boot applied.
